testcase.name: test_startup_analyze_budget_exhausted_returns_402
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_llm_budget_and_bilingual_iter30.py:77: in test_startup_analyze_budget_exhausted_returns_402 assert seed.status_code == 200, seed.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"dict_type","loc":["body","startup",0],"msg":"Input should be a valid dictionary","input":"Steam.exe","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/dict_type"},{"type":"dict_type","loc":["body","startup",1],"msg":"Input should be a valid dictionary","input":"Discord.exe","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/dict_type"},{"type":"dict_type","loc":["body","startup",2],"msg":"Input should be a valid dictionary","input":"OneDrive.exe","url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.13/v/dict_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
